mechanism_narrative: A rising 3-month trend in retail sales signals improving household demand and revenue expectations, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS momentum is above its recent trend.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value 363194 as of prior month
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS momentum does not produce higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower momentum states in walk-forward tests, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment crosses downward after a severe labor-market shock, investors revise recession-risk probabilities lower, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months while UNRATE remains above 8.0%
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 9.7 as of prior month
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment declines are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of instances, or if mean triggered returns are not above unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: A near-zero federal funds rate combined with non-deflationary CPI growth lowers discount rates while validating reflation, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.50% and CPIAUCSL 6-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 0.16 as of prior month
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not raise 20-day S&P 500 hit rate above the unconditional hit rate by at least 5 percentage points in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production crossing above its 6-month moving average signals a broad manufacturing recovery that lifts earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses above its trailing 6-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value 101.61 as of prior month
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO upside crossings are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns below the unconditional mean in more than half of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll contraction while unemployment remains elevated signals that household income and credit quality are still deteriorating, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is negative and UNRATE is above 8.0%
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value 129750 as of prior month
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts below 600 thousand units signal weak construction demand and constrained household balance-sheet repair, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value 575 as of two months prior
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-below-600 triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or mean returns exceed unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: A short-term acceleration in CPI when policy rates are pinned near zero raises real-income pressure and future tightening risk, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds its trailing 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS is below 0.50%
failure_condition: Reject if CPI acceleration under near-zero FEDFUNDS is followed by non-negative average 5-day S&P 500 returns or if the downside hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP crossing from contraction into positive quarterly growth signals a transition from recession to expansion, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth crosses from negative to positive
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value 13149.5 as of six months prior
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth crossings do not produce higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than negative-growth quarters, or if the triggered return mean is not statistically positive at p <= 0.10.
